positive: A minimalist vector-style illustration of a celestial forest at dusk. The scene features stylized, oversized bioluminescent mushrooms glowing in vibrant sapphire and amethyst tones, intertwining with graceful, curving roots and delicate, crystalline flora. The composition is highly centralized, with a main, silhouetted cluster of glowing elements forming a striking vertical composition against a deep indigo gradient sky. Use clean lines, high contrast, and negative space principles, suitable for a repeatable seamless repeat pattern. Style should be inspired by Art Nouveau graphic posters but rendered with crisp, modern digital vector precision. Lighting must be dramatic, emanating only from the glowing elements (mushrooms and flora), giving a vibrant, ethereal glow. Color palette: Deep indigo, sapphire blue, amethyst purple, and accents of neon lime green. --ar 1:1
